form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth after showing early speed, behind Always Bettor at this track over 1680m in a 3yo+ NMT 2 LTW's on March 29 at $101. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (FT Fr2) over 2180m at Burnie beaten a head by Feelinkindalucky (2:51.60) in NR up to 44 on March 13 at $1.90. Leading contender on best form.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 10th (Sr3) over 1609m at Hobart beaten 16 m by Colby Art (1:59.00) in NR up to 42 on April 3 at $18. The run prior 6th (Sr1) over 2090m at Hobart, beaten 13 m by Peanut Sutter (2:36.40) in NR up to 44 on March 25 at $8. Finds a much better draw this time and she can find winning form.
